lines.english: The Lord Himself administers the poisonous potion, to mislead and delude.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਤੁਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਝੂਠੇ ਸਭਿ ਬੋਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: ham tum sang jhootthe sabh bolaa |
lines.english: False is all his talk of me and you.
O Nanak, the the karma of past actions cannot be erased. ||2||
Beasts, birds, demons and ghosts

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜਾਨੋ ਤਹ ਰਹਨੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jeh jaano teh rehan na paavai |
lines.english: Wherever they go, they cannot remain there.
- in these many ways, the false wander in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਬਿਹੂਨ ਉਠਿ ਉਠਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: thaan bihoon utth utth fir dhaavai |
lines.english: They have no place of rest; they rise up again and again and run around.
Their minds and bodies are filled with immense, expansive desires.
The poor wretches are cheated by egotism.
They are filled with countless sins, and are severely punished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਮਾਤ ਨ ਬੰਧੁ ਨ ਮੀਤ ਨ ਜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: teh maat na bandh na meet na jaaeaa |
lines.english: There are no mothers there, no siblings, no friends and no spouses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee keemat kehan na jaaee |
lines.english: The extent of this cannot be estimated.
Forgetting God, they fall into hell.
Those humble beings, unto whom the Lord and Master becomes Merciful,
Rambling and roaming, wandering around, I came to seek the Sanctuary of God.
O Nanak, cross over. ||3||
The Merciful Lord God is the Destroyer of sorrow and suffering.
He is the Master of the meek, the father and mother of the world.
He emancipates whoever He pleases.
Emancipation comes through loving devotional worship.
The Holy Saint is the very embodiment of the Lord's form.
He lifts them up and pulls him out of the deep dark pit.
He Himself saves us from the great fire.
In the beginning and in the end, God is inaccessible and unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸੰਜਮ ਇਸ ਤੇ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam is te kichh naahee |
lines.english: By myself, I cannot practice meditation, austerities, penance and self-discipline.
Please bless me with Your Name, Lord; Your slave begs only for this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਵਨ ਪਦੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: har jeevan pad naanak prabh meraa |4|3|19|
lines.english: O Nanak, my Lord God is the Giver of the true state of life. ||4||3||19||
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਸੂਰੋ ਗੁਰ ਦਾਤਾ ਰਾਖੈ ਆਪਿ ਵਡਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saran sooro gur daataa raakhai aap vaddaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The brave and heroic Guru, the Generous Giver, gives Sanctuary and preserves our honor. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਤ ਕਉ ਡਹਕਾਵਹੁ ਲੋਗਾ ਮੋਹਨ ਦੀਨ ਕਿਰਪਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kat kau ddahakaavahu logaa mohan deen kirapaaee |1|
lines.english: Why do you try to deceive others, O people of the world? The Fascinating Lord is Merciful to the meek. ||1||
This is what I have come to know.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕਾ ਆਗਿਆਕਾਰੀ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kaa aagiaakaaree sadaa sadaa sukhadaaee |2|
lines.english: He submits to the Will of His devotees; He is forever and ever the Giver of peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੇ ਕਉ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੀਅਹੁ ਇਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: apane kau kirapaa kareeahu ik naam dhiaaee |3|
lines.english: Please bless me with Your Mercy, that I may meditate on Your Name alone. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦੀਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਾਗੈ ਦੁਤੀਆ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਈ ॥੪॥੪॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak deen naam maagai duteea bharam chukaaee |4|4|20|
lines.english: Nanak, the meek and humble, begs for the Naam, the Name of the Lord; it eradicates duality and doubt. ||4||4||20||
I am just His poor servant. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਨੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਮਨ ਪ੍ਰਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: mohan laal meraa preetam man praanaa |
lines.english: My Enticing Beloved is very dear to my mind and my breath of life.
My Lord and Master is utterly powerful.
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:
I have seen and tested all.
There is none other than Him. ||2||
He blesses me with His gift. ||1||Pause||
and link Nanak to Your service. ||4||5||21||
He sustains and nurtures all beings.
Please bless me with Your Mercy, O Divine Lord,
He was, and shall always be. ||3||
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਨ ਤਾਰਨ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲੇ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: patit udhaaran taaran bal bal bale bal jaaeeai |
lines.english: The Redeemer of sinners, who carries us across; I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਕੋਈ ਭੇਟੈ ਸੰਤੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aisaa koee bhettai sant jit har hare har dhiaaeeai |1|
lines.english: If only I could meet with such a Saint, who would inspire me to meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, Har. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋ ਕਉ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਨਤ ਕਹੀਅਤ ਦਾਸੁ ਤੁਮਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: mo kau koe na jaanat kaheeat daas tumaaraa |
lines.english: No one knows me; I am called Your slave.
This is my support and sustenance. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮਰੀ ਬਿਧਿ ਤੁਮ ਹੀ ਜਾਨਹੁ ਤੁਮ ਜਲ ਹਮ ਮੀਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tumaree bidh tum hee jaanahu tum jal ham meenaa |2|
lines.english: You alone know Your Way; You are the water, and I am the fish. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਧਾਰਨ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਰਨ ਇਕ ਬਿਨਉ ਦੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sarab dhaaran pratipaaran ik binau deenaa |
lines.english: You support and cherish all; I am meek and humble - this is my only prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੋ ਭੂ ਮੰਡਲ ਖੰਡਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਮ ਹੀ ਆਛੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sagalo bhoo manddal khanddal prabh tum hee aachhai |3|
lines.english: O God, You are pervading all the worlds, solar systems and galaxies. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਬਿਸਥੀਰਨ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਆਹਿ ਆਇਓ ਪਾਛੈ ॥
lines.translit: pooran bisatheeran suaamee aaeh aaeo paachhai |
lines.english: O Perfect and Expansive Lord and Master, I follow You in love.
